meta.title: NEGROS OCCIDENTAL
meta.subtitle: Negros Occidental, Western Visayas
meta.description: Negros Occidental is known as the 'Sugar Bowl of the Philippines,' producing over half of the country's sugar. Beyond its agricultural fame, it boasts a rich heritage of ancestral mansions, Spanish-era churches, volcanic peaks, and pristine coastlines, making it a destination of culture, nature, and gastronomy.

attractions.name: The Ruins
attractions.description: The 'Taj Mahal of Negros' — a grandly ruined mansion surrounded by lush gardens.

attractions.name: Mount Kanlaon
attractions.description: An active volcano and the highest peak in the Visayas, a hiker's paradise.

attractions.name: Victorias Milling Company
attractions.description: One of the world's largest sugar mills with the famous Angry Christ mural.

attractions.name: Silay Heritage Houses
attractions.description: Walk through Silay City's 30+ ancestral houses dating from the 19th century.

attractions.name: Mambukal Mountain Resort
attractions.description: A government resort with seven waterfalls, hot springs, and mountain trails.

attractions.name: Cadiz Saltbeds
attractions.description: Vast salt flats that turn pink at sunset, a unique natural spectacle.

attractions.name: Sugar Industry Museum
attractions.description: Traces the history of sugarcane cultivation and the hacienda culture of Negros.

attractions.name: Lake Danao
attractions.description: A tranquil crater lake ideal for fishing and early morning picnics.

attractions.name: Danjugan Island
attractions.description: A protected marine sanctuary with pristine reefs and lagoons.

activities.name: MassKara Festival Parade
activities.description: Join the electrifying October street dance festival known for smiling masks.

activities.name: Mount Kanlaon Trekking
activities.description: Multi-day guided trek to the summit of the Visayas' highest active volcano.

activities.name: Silay Heritage Walk
activities.description: Guided walking tour through the colonial streets and mansions of Silay.

activities.name: Scuba Diving at Danjugan
activities.description: Dive among vibrant coral gardens teeming with marine life at Danjugan Island.

activities.name: Mambukal Hot Spring Soak
activities.description: Relax in natural sulfuric hot spring pools set in the mountain resort.

activities.name: Sugar Farm Tour
activities.description: Ride vintage sugar cane trains and explore the hacienda life of Negros.

activities.name: Whale Shark Watching
activities.description: Swim alongside gentle whale sharks off the shores of Negros Occidental.

activities.name: Negrense Cooking Class
activities.description: Learn to cook iconic Negrense dishes like chicken inasal and napoleones.

activities.name: Island Hopping Hinoba-an
activities.description: Explore remote islands with white sand beaches and clear blue waters.

food.name: Chicken Inasal
food.description: Bacolod's legendary grilled chicken marinated in calamansi and annatto, a national icon.

food.name: Napoleones
food.description: Flaky puff pastry filled with sweet custard cream, Negros Occidental's most beloved pasalubong.

food.name: Cansi
food.description: A sour beef shank and bone marrow soup, Negrense comfort food at its finest.

food.name: La Paz Batchoy
food.description: Thick egg noodle soup with pork organs and crushed chicharon, originated in Iloilo.

food.name: Pinasugbo
food.description: Banana chips cooked in caramelized sugar and sesame — a crispy Negrense sweet.

food.name: Piaya of Negros
food.description: Flat muscovado-filled unleavened bread, a must-buy delicacy of the province.

food.name: Baked Scallops
food.description: Fresh scallops baked with garlic butter and cheese, a coastal Negrense delicacy.

food.name: Negrense Cakes & Pastries
food.description: From caramel bars to mango pie, Negrense bakers craft exquisite Spanish-inspired sweets.

food.name: Tuba (Coconut Wine)
food.description: Locally tapped coconut palm wine, a traditional drink enjoyed throughout Negros.

events.name: MassKara Festival
events.description: October — Bacolod's world-famous festival of smiling masks and vibrant street dancing.

events.name: Panaad sa Negros Festival
events.description: April — provincial festival showcasing the culture, food, and dances of all Negros towns.

events.name: Kanlaon Triathlon
events.description: Annual triathlon race across the Kanlaon volcano landscape attracting regional athletes.

events.name: Buglasan Festival
events.description: October — 'Festival of Festivals' in Negros Oriental celebrating cultural heritage.

events.name: Kadaugan sa Mactan
events.description: April 27 — commemorating Lapu-Lapu's victory with re-enactments and cultural shows.

events.name: Hugot Fiesta
events.description: December — Negrense music festival celebrating original compositions and performances.

events.name: Sugarcane Harvest Festival
events.description: January–April — hacienda open houses with sugar milling tours and local food fairs.

events.name: Inasal sa Dalan
events.description: Street food festival in Bacolod dedicated entirely to chicken inasal varieties.

events.name: Silay Heritage Month
events.description: September — month-long celebration with art exhibits, tours, and ancestral house openings.

accommodations.name: The Ruins Boutique Hotel
accommodations.description: Elegant hotel inspired by The Ruins mansion with stunning garden views.

accommodations.name: Sugarland Hotel
accommodations.description: Bacolod's premier hotel with full amenities in the city center.

accommodations.name: L'Fisher Hotel
accommodations.description: Iconic business hotel in central Bacolod with a celebrated restaurant.

accommodations.name: Mambukal Mountain Resort Hotel
accommodations.description: Stay overnight at the foot of the waterfalls in comfortable forest chalets.

accommodations.name: Danjugan Island Camp
accommodations.description: Eco-camp on a pristine island with beach camping and marine sanctuary access.

accommodations.name: Silay Heritage Inn
accommodations.description: Restored ancestral house offering an authentic colonial Negrense experience.

accommodations.name: Kanlaon Basecamp Lodge
accommodations.description: Budget lodge at the foot of Mount Kanlaon for mountaineers and adventurers.

accommodations.name: Bacolod Grand Central Hotel
accommodations.description: Modern mid-range hotel with business facilities in downtown Bacolod.

accommodations.name: The Henry Hotel
accommodations.description: A boutique lifestyle hotel with local art installations and a rooftop pool.
